response.justification: Strong 20-year engineering trajectory with recent full-stack experience (Optilyz 2021–2025) directly matching the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS). Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling. Demonstrated seniority, testing discipline, and architectural thinking across microservices and enterprise contexts. Minor gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned, and PostgreSQL absent from documented experience.
strengths: Recent full-stack role at Optilyz directly mirrors primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK
Current role includes AI agent development and MCP code generators—a required skill explicitly listed
Progressive seniority (Staff/Senior levels) with 20 years of experience; demonstrated mentorship through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned; while Node.js expertise is strong, specific framework mastery is unclear
Vitest not called out; testing focus is evident (TDD, workshops) but specific tool proficiency unconfirmed
PostgreSQL absent from documented background; experience with MongoDB and MySQL, but not the primary relational DB listed

key_factors.factor: Recent stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
AI agent development experience in current role
